name: OneClaw
description: OneClaw desktop app — cross-platform Electron shell for openclaw

scripts.build:chat: cd chat-ui/ui && npm install --prefer-offline && npx vite build
scripts.build: npm run generate:settings-icons && npm run build:chat && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && ONECLAW_TARGET=darwin-arm64 npm run package:resources -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && ONECLAW_TARGET=darwin-arm64 node scripts/run-with-env.js node scripts/run-mac-builder.js --arch arm64 --output out/darwin-arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && ONECLAW_TARGET=darwin-x64 npm run package:resources -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && ONECLAW_TARGET=darwin-x64 node scripts/run-with-env.js node scripts/run-mac-builder.js --arch x64 --output out/darwin-x64
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run build && ONECLAW_TARGET=win32-x64 npm run package:resources -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && ONECLAW_TARGET=win32-x64 electron-builder --win --x64 --config.directories.output=out/win32-x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build && ONECLAW_TARGET=win32-arm64 npm run package:resources -- --platform win32 --arch arm64 && ONECLAW_TARGET=win32-arm64 electron-builder --win --arm64 --config.directories.output=out/win32-arm64 --publish never
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist resources/runtime resources/gateway resources/targets out
